description: Invite everyone to jam out and party with this happy New Year email template. This concert-themed template is perfect for virtual or in-person music events. Design this template to identify with your brand by including personalized copy, CTAs and social media handles.

designer.description:
Graphic designer with a keen interest in typography, layout and illustration. 
Currently exploring & experimenting with all things UI :))
